he knows (what is in السَّمَآءِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ)
that (pointing to something far) (refers to what's written in كِتٰبٍ)
that (pointing to something far) (refers to what Allah knows)
he sends down repeatedly (negated by لَمْ)
any authority (object of يُنَزِّلْ - send down)
from/of (connects دُونِ to what comes after it)
and when (introduces the condition of تُتْلَىٰ - when [verses] are recited)
they almost do something (referring to the disbelievers who are about to attack those who recite Allah's verses)
they attack violently (referring to the disbelievers attacking those who recite Allah's verses)
they recite (referring to those who disbelieve)
upon them (the disbelievers who see our clear signs)
our signs (object of تُتْلَىٰ - being recited)
so shall I inform you all?
he promised her (referring to النار/the Fire)
and how evil! (connected to النَّارُ/the Fire)
was struck/given (as an example to مَثَلٌ)
for/to him/it (referring to ذُبَابًا - a fly)
they create/are creating (referring to false deities who cannot create even a fly)
he snatches away from them (referring to the flies mentioned in ذُبَابًا)
the seeker (subject of ضَعُفَ - became weak)
they measured/estimated correctly (subject of negation ما)
His true measure/worth (referring to Allah's worth)
Allah (the one true God being acted upon)
that which (object of يَعْلَمُ - He knows)
between (what is in front of them)
their hands (what is before them in أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ)
and what (connected to مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ - what is before them)
the matters, the affairs (subject of تُرْجَعُ)
those who (referring to the believers mentioned after)
they believed (referring to the believers being addressed)
and bow down! (command to many people)
and do! (command to a group) (followed by ٱلْخَيْرَ - the good)
perhaps you all (expressing hope that you will succeed)
He (referring to Allah who named you Muslims)
the religion (as object of اتَّبِعُوا - follow)
Abraham (as the object of مِلَّةَ - religion/way)
the ones who submit (to Allah) (object of سَمَّىٰكُمُ - He named you)
before (referring to مِن before this word in the ayah)
this (pointing to something in this ayah)
so that he may be (connected to الرَّسُولُ شَهِيدًا - the messenger being a witness)
a witness (object of لِيَكُونَ - so that he may be)
upon you all (object of جَعَلَ meaning 'He placed')
and you all may become (witnesses on people)
of the people (after the word عَلَى meaning 'upon')
He (referring to Allah in this ayah)
and how excellent! (connected to مَوْلَىٰكُمْ - your protector)
the protector (subject of نِعْمَ - how excellent)
